executives.name: Badar Khan
executives.background: Badar Khan has served as our Chief Executive Officer since November 2023. Prior to joining EVgo, Mr. Khan served as President of National Grid US from 2019 to 2022. He also served as a member of the National Grid plc executive committee. Prior to National Grid, Mr. Khan worked at Centrica plc for 14 years, including as Chief Executive Officer of Direct Energy.

tenure_dates.title: Various Senior Executive Positions (including Divisional President)

executives.name: Maura Clark
executives.background: Ms. Clark is a former Managing Director of Investment Banking at Goldman Sachs and has extensive experience in finance and capital markets.
